title: JDT Time Accelerators
description: Adds Simple and Advanced Time Accelerators for Just Dire Things, letting you automate Time Wand-style block acceleration with machine-style controls.
body:
# JDT Time Accelerators

JDT Time Accelerators is a NeoForge addon for Just Dire Things that turns Time Wand-style acceleration into placeable, powered machines.

Instead of manually using a Time Wand, this mod adds two automation blocks:

## Features

*   **Simple Time Accelerator**
    
    *   Accelerates the single block directly in front of it.
    *   Uses Forge Energy.
    *   Uses Time Fluid when required by the Just Dire Things Time Wand config.
    *   Supports redstone control.
    *   Speed is controlled from the GUI using Time Wand-style multipliers.
*   **Advanced Time Accelerator**
    
    *   Accelerates blocks in a configurable area.
    *   Uses the familiar Just Dire Things area controls.
    *   Uses Forge Energy and, when configured, Time Fluid.
    *   Supports redstone control.
    *   Can use the full configured Time Wand multiplier range.

The machines are designed to behave predictably: the multiplier shown in the GUI is the acceleration multiplier being applied. There is no hidden machine tick-speed stacking on top.

## Requirements

*   Minecraft 1.21.1
*   NeoForge 21.1.209 or newer
*   Just Dire Things 1.5.7 or newer

## Recipes

The Simple Time Accelerator is crafted with Ferricore Ingots, a Clock, Lapis Lazuli, Redstone, and a Just Dire Things Time Crystal.

The Advanced Time Accelerator upgrades the Simple tier using Celestigem, Clocks, and Redstone.

Use JEI or another recipe viewer for exact layouts.
